title: cyclobalanopsis horsfieldii
intro: Cyclobalanopsis horsfieldii, also known as the Horsfield's chestnut or Taiwan chestnut, is a deciduous tree species native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis horsfieldii include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
